data.description:
Hybrid Kinetic Group ( (HK:1188) ) just unveiled an update.

Despite the trading suspension, the company has seen reactivation in its business operations, with sales of battery management systems and spare parts indicating potential sustainable growth. Hope Education Group Co., Ltd. ( (HK:1765) ) just unveiled an announcement.
